response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has approximately 15 years of broad software engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which shows some alignment with the role's AI focus. However, the position is a Director-level IC requiring recognized, demonstrated expertise in AI/ML at scale, the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers, and cloud platform leadership — none of which are substantiated in this resume. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no history of building or leading AI products at scale, and no evidence of executive-level strategic advisory work or cross-organizational influence commensurate with this seniority.
strengths: Roughly 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded domains
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, indicating early engagement with agentic AI trends
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective with open-source platform delivery and public conference speaking
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; educational background does not meet the preferred qualifications for this senior, AI-focused role
AI experience is nascent and narrow — limited to current-role tooling with no demonstrated track record of building or shipping AI products or platforms at scale

Current and historical titles are Senior/Staff Software Developer, well below the Director-level IC seniority required, with no evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive stakeholder engagement, or organizational-scale influence

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI/ML expertise or products at scale
Broad technical breadth and recent AI tooling exposure
